title: Reshaped Vanilla x Fresh Animations
description: Adds compatibility with FreshLX's fresh animation pack with Reshaped Vanilla.
body:
# What does this pack do?

[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c30f49d11925460a3bad4d82ad6c1ad4896dc91c_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reshaped-vanilla-x-fresh-animations)
[![PlanetMinecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adedc938342a8f3414b8dec22eaeb6a27725ad32.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/reshaped-vanilla-x-fresh-animations)
[![Curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9775bb2356853555b1fdff43122d77a724cfde15_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/reshaped-vanilla-x-fresh-animations-curseforge)
[![Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0fd3f925b9c9ba45f2b8455d3cd961ba223a43e.png)](https://ko-fi.com/E1E11E2NHU)
#

This pack makes it so you can use the resource pack Reshaped Vanilla with Fresh animations.
# 



**WARNING!**

**DOWNLOAD ALL OF THE REQUIRED MODS AND RESOURCE PACKS! IF YOU DON'T WANT ENTITY MODEL FEATURES AND ENTITY MODELS, THEN OPTIFINE IS REQUIRED. PLEASE PUT THE PACKS IN THE ORDER IN THE GALLERY. THERE ARE OTHER REQUIREMENTS, SO DOWNLOAD THEM ALL.**


# 

**Installation Guide:**

#

![Pack order (new)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e89fd2a4accca70c546c2ec0b94b57465d6db0d.png)




**Windows:**
1. Go to your files to %appdata% and then go to the /.minecraft/ folder.
2. Go to /.minecraft/resourcepacks.
3. Put the resourcepack in the folder.

**Linux:**

1. Go to your files to your /.minecraft/ folder.
2. Then go to /resourcepacks/.
3. Put the resourcepack in the same folder.

**MacOS**

1. Go to ~/.minecraft/resourcepacks/ in your file manager.
2. Put the pack inside that folder.

# 

This pack requires optifine or Entity model features.

#

[ETF] Entity Texture Features

https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures

# 

**Credit**

Freshlx: https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX

I did not animate anything these animations were made by FreshLX.

# 

**Shaders**:

Amethyst Shaders:
[https://modrinth.com/shader/amethyst-shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/amethyst-shaders)

Complementary Unbound:

[https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound]

BSL Shaders:
[[https://modrinth.com/shader/yofps](https://modrinth.com/shader/yofps)

# 

Thanks For Downloading!
